name: alphaTab
when_to_use: 需要把 alphaTex 或 MusicXML 渲成同时含标准谱与吉他 tab、保留节奏/推弦/多轨信息的浏览器谱面时用它,而非 ASCII tab 或手写 SVG——原生手写在节奏对齐、吉他技法 glyph 和多轨排版上失败;它非做谱面编辑器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写丢失节奏与技法的 ASCII tab,做不到标准谱/tab 联排、推弦等专用符号和可扩展播放管线;alphaTab 将文本/交换格式直接刻成生产级 SVG。

data_in.note: format 必填以消除 tex() 与二进制 importer 的歧义;alphaTex 是库专用 DSL,故附 minimal example。默认 boot 只刻谱,不自动开 WebAudio。

schema.format: 'alphatex' | 'musicxml' —— 必填;alphatex 走 api.tex(string),musicxml 先 UTF-8 编码再走 api.load(Uint8Array)
schema.notation: string —— format=alphatex 时为从元数据到 . 分隔符及音符的完整 alphaTex;format=musicxml 时为完整 <score-partwise>/<score-timewise> 文档
schema.playback?: boolean —— 是否启用原生 WebAudio 播放器并加载随包 soundfont,默认 false;宿主仍须由消费 AI 提供播放 UI并处理用户手势

spec.note: 谱面容器默认固定 560px 高并滚动;禁 vh/百分比高。渲染端设 useWorkers:false 以避免 +esm 相对 worker URL 歧义;playback=true 仍要求 WebAudio、worklet/worker、soundfont CDN 与用户手势,需载体实测。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):ESM import + pinned font/soundfont;默认 SVG/useWorkers:false,按 format 调 tex 或 load。

example._why: alphaTex 是专用 DSL,点号前后语义和弦/弦号写法高歧义,minimal 用官方原生 api.tex 输入形态校准。

carriers.widget: conditional:刻谱需 ESM + Bravura font-cdn并可落 shadow;playback 额外要求 worker/worklet、WebAudio、soundfont 与用户手势
carriers.codex: conditional:纯刻谱路径支持 ESM/SVG/font-cdn;playback 路径需单独通过 wasm+webaudio 能力探针

isolation.evidence: API verified against @coderline/alphatab@1.8.4/dist/alphaTab.d.ts: import{AlphaTabApi} is a real named export; constructor(element:HTMLElement, options:SettingsJson|Settings) (L255); api.tex(tex:string) (L259) and api.load(scoreData:unknown):boolean (L626) — boot's tex()/load(Uint8Array) dispatch is correct. CoreSettings.engine/useWorkers/scriptFile/fontDirectory all real (L6081/6100/5970/5985); PlayerSettings.enablePlayer:boolean (L13648) and soundFont:string|null (L13610) real. Asset paths exist: dist/font/Bravura.woff2, dist/soundfont/sonivox.sf2, dist/alphaTab.mjs. HEAVY global footprint: +esm injects a music-font stylesheet into the DOCUMENT head — createElement('style'); s.id='alphaTabStyle...'; s.innerHTML=cssSource; t.getElementsByTagName('head').item(0).appendChild(s) — @font-face must be at document level (font-face rules do not apply inside a shadow root), so this is unavoidable. FontLoadingChecker appends a hidden trigger element to document.body (r.innerText='Trigger ... load'; document.body.appendChild(r)); player/export paths append audio/anchor to body. Registers window.addEventListener('resize',...) (2 sites) plus ResizeObserver. SVG renders into the provided element (can be in shadow) but the font @font-face + body probe leak to the main document → conditional, not zero-footprint.
